Today is Coronation Day" the
eliminating event Being the crown
ing Of the carnival queen and the
first appearance Of herself and suite.
The ceremony will take place at 8
o'clock. Miss Stella Sperry. chief
maid Of honor. placing the crown
upon the regnant brow Of this 20th
century Elizabeth. A. ]. Laughon,
as prime minister. will be the Sir
Walter Raleigh Of the occasion and
will spread his gilded coat on the
damp sawdust If exacting courtliness
require 1t.


Governor Mcbride will be present,
taking part in the exercises.


Director General E. +. Quinn in
opening the carnival last night and
speaking for the Trades Council. de-
livered the following address, which
is given in full. 1t is a fair and con-
sentative statement Of organized la
boris position:


QUINN's SPEECH.


':Mr Mayor: In behalf of the
trades council of Spokane thank you
for the honor you have conferred
upon organized labor in presenting
the freedom Of this beautiful city.
I gladly accept this key to the city
as a token Of your confidence and
esteem, and feel sure you will not
have cause to regret its bestowal.
l desire at this time to likewise ac-
knowledge the cooperation and many
evidences of sympathy and good will
manifested by tho honorable city
council and other branches Of the
city government. To merit this man.
Hesitation of appreciation from the
civic authorities speaks we'll for the
manner in which the Industrial inter-
ests of this great body or workers
have been conducted In the past. 1t
augers well for the peace and har-
mony of the future, Mr.. Mayor, when
the civil government Of our city and
the industrial classes can thus meet
upon common ground and bestow evil
dences of kindred feelings of sym
pathy and respect.


Fellow Citizens: We have here a
great city. but we shall build a great
err one. Here on the everlasting rocks
we have blasted out a firm founda-
tion that shall endure no sand about
this foundation. Nature has been
most lavish in the bestowal of her
precious gifts of beauty and utility,
and the ingenuity of man will con-
tinue to turn them INTO blessings
for the human race. Capital and
labor. hand In hand. shall be the
agencies. What proportion of Pc
cuniary profit shall each extract from
the fruition of these great achieve
ments? My friends. that Is the great
question of the hour throughout this
old world Of ours: How shall the
revenues be divided? How shall the
